goals.title: If an encrypted app-state envelope exists but the selected keychain/v...
goals.objective: If an encrypted app-state envelope exists but the selected keychain/vault has no wrapping key, saving fails closed instead of creating a replacement wrapping key.
goals.evidence: Changed load_or_create_wrapping_key so existing encrypted app-state plus Ok(None) from keychain returns KeychainMissing instead of creating a replacement wrapping key.

goals.evidence: Added wrong-password and missing-vault assertions preserving existing encrypted app-state/vault bytes.

goals.title: P1-T04 dev/prod storage separation

Local cargo unavailable.
